system_media.name: Local Now Playing
system_media.description: Records music currently playing on this device through system media controls.

local_now_playing.description: Records music currently playing in local players such as Spotify and Apple Music.

enabled.label: Enable Listening Record
enabled.description: Automatically detect and record music currently playing in local players. Spotify and Apple Music usually work; NetEase Cloud Music is not currently guaranteed to surface here.

sync_interval_minutes.label: Recording Frequency
sync_interval_minutes.description: How often completed playback records are saved to memory.

min_session_seconds.label: Minimum Play Duration (seconds)
min_session_seconds.description: Playback shorter than this is ignored, mainly to filter out songs you opened and skipped right away.

pause_timeout_seconds.label: Pause Before Ending Record (seconds)
pause_timeout_seconds.description: If playback stays paused longer than this, the current playback record is considered finished. For example, 300 means a 5-minute pause ends the record.

section_notes.sync: These two thresholds decide when a listening record is valid and when it ends: minimum play duration filters out quick skips, while pause-before-ending decides when one listening session should be closed.
